Claude API Key

Only needed if you want to use Claude lanes. Stored encrypted in the vault.

Hybrid AI Routing

Choose which provider each processing lane should use. Auto project routing will follow these lane defaults unless you override the provider per project.

Choose local, Claude, or a hybrid mix.
Claude Models

Optional paid provider. Enable Claude only if you want some lanes to use Anthropic models.

Enable Claude provider
Claude stays optional. Leave routing on Ollama if you want local-only.
Local Ollama Models

Configure one local Ollama model per processing lane. You can keep everything local, enable Claude for selected lanes, or mix both.

Saved values are also cached in this browser for quick reloads.

Website Allowlist

Approved websites for AI research and tasks. One domain per line.

Autonomous Mode
Agent OFF
words/day
Idle Task Queue
When autonomous mode is enabled and there are no active projects, the agent picks a random enabled task. Edit the description to customize what the AI does.
